meaning: n.<拉>[化]石(常用于化学中的矿物命名)
examples: The sea was of a lapis lazuli blue.
Lapis Lazuli was very expensive and hard to get.
They are circling the Lapis Lazuli stone in clockwise direction.
Around us are huge boulders painted pink, green and grey, as well as the dominant lapis blue.
The most impressive example on display is a magnificent lapis lazuli seal with a carved bull for a handle.
